google.text: lange LOGISTICS Carrier Rate Confirmation and Dispatch Lange Logistics Inc St Louis. 500 N Broadway Ste 1320 St Louis, MO 63102 Taylor Oberg toberg@langelogistics.com (314) 588-0403 (phone) / +1 6183352081 (mobile) Carrier: Davutrans INC Contact: Andy Stones, (p) 2242817651 (f) Temp Control: Continuous (45F-45F) Load Number: 222304 Rate: USD 2250.00 Fixed Cost Equipment Type: Reefer 53' Shipper Pickup - 2510463 Onions 52 Cincinnati 4285 Dues Drive West Chester Township, OH US 45014 Expected Date: 02/27/2026 Shipping/Receiving Hours: 07:00-17:00 Appointment Required: No Contact: 513-860-0059 Pickup Instructions: Shipper References: Pickup/Delivery Number: 2510463 Shipment Information Handling Unit/Commodity Qty Type 960 Cases Weight 43500 lbs Commodity Description Onions Consignee Delivery (Stop 2) - 13497334 Food Lion Elloree SC 258 Snider Street Elloree, SC US 29047 Expected Date: 02/28/2026 Shipping/Receiving Hours: Appointment Required: Yes 08:00 Contact: Delivery Instructions: *Driver's must remove load bars from load before backing into the dock Driver must have an appt from Lange. Delivering early or late into this DC may result in a fee. Failure to deliver within the 60 minute appointment window may result in a late fee of $400. POD must be turned in same day as delivery. Failure to do so many result in charges. All drivers must wear a safety vest at all times while on Food Lion property. Failure to do so results in a $450 fine. As they go through the gate they are required to sign paperwork saying they will have to wear a vest. If the BOL does not note at time of delivery: (a) that the driver is wearing a reflective safety vest; and (b) the in-and-out date and times, as instructed on this Rate Confirmation, then this will be considered a breach of the Agreement and therefore an Event of Default which will result in a delay of payment to CARRIER.
